content: the power on the god can not be overcome. Zanza... This Is Providence Of The World even Gods Are Nearly Beings Restricted To The Limited Power Determined By Problems That Power Although Great Is Not Unlimited. The Voice Abix! How Dare You Disappay Me?! I Am Menadeh I Was Here At The Beginning And Will Proclaim The End But That.... That Is Impossible Choke! It Is Time For You To Choose Does This World Belong To Zanza Or Does It Belong To You? Thats Is Something I Decided Long Ago! We Use Our Power To Fell A God And Then These Are Destiny! Its Fated The Memory Of A Gods Existence Born From The Chaos Of Creation IT IS!!!
